notes: Implemented Stage 6 systems on top of Stage 5: added a runtime DraftSystem with 10-card pool (new defense/upgrade/perk types), per-floor draft selection flow, persistent perk effects (starting scrap bonus and trap reset), and draft-driven defense unlock/upgrades. Finalized economy wiring: starting scrap baseline 60 with floor-loss penalty handling, passive +3 scrap per wave clear, and kill rewards set to Grey 2 / Stalker 5 / Tech Unit 10 / Overlord 50. Reworked HUDController for animated scrap counter, wave countdown display, floor + integrity bar UI, richer draft cards, and expanded run-end overlay (best defense + ad placeholder). Rebuilt DefensePlacementController palette into a horizontal scrollable UI with affordability greying and selection highlighting; added trap-reset perk support through DefenseInstance. Added MainMenuController runtime setup for Campaign plus disabled Endless/Meta buttons with Coming Soon badges. Added Stage 6 EditMode and PlayMode test suites covering draft/economy/run-end flow and menu return path. Verification: zero compile errors, EditMode 23/23 passing, PlayMode 15/15 passing, GameScene play-mode sanity confirmed floor renderer/spawner/HUD systems active with runtime wave progression and console error count 0.
